form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Last start finished 5th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 3 lengths (22.84) behind Paw Vitali in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 11. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Drawn the inside. Last start finished 5th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 3 lengths (22.84) behind Paw Vitali in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 11. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked in back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last in a Mix 6/7 on March 31 over 410m at Horsham behind Kaelix Storm beaten 15 lengths (24.21). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last in a Mix 6/7 on March 31 over 410m at Horsham behind Kaelix Storm beaten 15 lengths (24.21). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.3 lengths second (25.77) over 450m at Shepparton. Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.3 lengths second (25.77) over 450m at Shepparton. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th on March 27 over 400m at Geelong behind Socialism beaten 6 lengths (23.10) in a Mix 6/7. Placed two back at Ballarat. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Mix 6/7 on April 14 over 400m at Warragul behind Maudie Rose beaten 8 lengths (23.84). Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 4 lengths in 24.30, beating High Five Indi. Last start finished last over 435m at Sale beaten 10 lengths (25.43) behind Dr. Beyond in a Mix 6/7 on April 12. Not likely to feature on this occasion.
